content.scenarioHint: 在会议前确认设备需求时，你可以向服务人员询问什么?
expectedAnswers: Can you set up the projector and mic for us?
Do you have a projector and a microphone available for our meeting?
Can we borrow a projector and a microphone for our presentation?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你想确认会议所需设备是否已经准备好
expectedAnswers: Do you have the projector and video equipment set up?
Is the Zoom meeting room ready with all the necessary devices?
Have you got the equipment we need for the meeting ready?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词

content.speakerText: We’re presenting tomorrow — do we need anything special for the tech setup?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们明天要演示，技术设备上需要特别准备什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Just a screen and a wireless presenter — we’ve got those covered.
We’ll need an HDMI cable and a backup laptop in case the main one fails.
Could you check if the room has a sound system too? We’ll need speakers for the audio.
evaluationCriteria: 是否识别并回应了演示场景的核心设备需求
是否使用了至少两个场景关键词（如 screen, presenter, HDMI, speakers）
表达是否清晰、有逻辑，是否主动提出潜在需求
